film.title: Chal Mere Bhai
film.overview: Vicky, a businessman, loves his younger brother Prem, who spends his time chasing women. The family feels that secretary Sapna will make a good wife for Vicky, but she is already in love with Prem.

dialogues.dialogue: Why are you laughing, shorty? - Here she comes. - Why have you come here? - What is it? - Grandma...Aren't you ashamed to ogle at two young men? What sorry? Pick that up and pass it to me. Forget it.

There's a lot of difference in yourworking style and mine. What will the horse eat if he befriends the grass? Aren't you ashamed to be lying to my Dad? Had I told him the truth he would have been hurt. - You should have let him be hurt! - He thinks you've come here to work.

She has come to her uncle not you. Don't be rude to her today. - Why? - She's a very proud girl. - She's come here to look for a job. You've neverfound a job. How will she get one? I'm sure I'll get this job!
